[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [Textmodifier](../../Textmodifier.md) / isLooping

# Method: isLooping()

```ts
isLooping(): boolean;
```

Whether the automatic render loop is currently running.

## Returns

`boolean`

`true` when the render loop is active.
